purpose: Fixture manifest for the Phase 1 Step 5 schema validation harness. Valid fixtures are mapped by filename pattern <family>.valid.json. Invalid fixtures must declare their target schema and the rule violation each demonstrates.

invalid_mvp_status_shorthand.json.expectedFailureReason: mvp_status set to 'mvp' (scaffold shorthand) violates decisionClosureStatus $defs.enum (VR-24).

invalid_integration_missing_procore_boun.expectedFailureReason: noFullProcoreMirror set to false violates const: true (VR-16; Contract P-10).

invalid_integration_procore_secret_like_.expectedFailureReason: Extra property 'procoreClientSecret' violates additionalProperties: false; secret-class fields are forbidden by VR-13. Fixture intentionally contains a secret-like field name to demonstrate schema rejection; integrity-check secret scanner skips invalid/ fixtures by design.

invalid_module_visibility_keyed_on_proje.expectedFailureReason: visibilityByStage contains key 'commercial' (a ProjectType) which violates visibilityByStage.additionalProperties: false; visibility must key strictly on the six ProjectStage tokens (VR-07).

invalid_template_contract_missing_family.expectedFailureReason: Top-level template-contract instance is missing the 'enums' family entry, which violates template-contract.schema.json families.required.
